message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Web User" as user
participant "index" as index
participant "Main.view" as main_view
participant "Image.View" as image_view
participant "ImageController" as controller
participant "DB" as db
participant "DBE" as db_e
participant "ImageModel" as model
participant "images" as images_db
participant "Images" as images_table

user -> index : 1:Need to see some Pictures
index -> controller : 1:1 new ImageController( new DB ( DBE ) )
controller -> db : new DB ( BDE::MySQL )
db --> controller : getDNS(); getUser(); getPass()
controller -> images_db : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare(SELECT id,filename,title,description FROM images)
images_db --> controller : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt ->execute()
controller -> images_table : $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_CLASS, ImageModel::class)
controller -> index : 1:0|1* $images array
index -> image_view : render ()
image_view -> main_view : + layout
main_view -> index : 
index -> user : he/she dont know how many work it was ;-)

@enduml
